spec.name: A Steep Slope
spec.description: This slopes leads down and to the west from here. Up above, you see a plateau at the southern end of a long mountain ridge. Surpisingly, there seems to be signs of traffic in this area, leading into the large depression here. The going looks somewhat dangerous, and you decide to exercise a little caution.

extra_descs.description: A few boot prints lead way in the dust here. There is definitely traffic here, but this area is not what you would call well-travelled.
